notes: Phase 4/5 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Affliction Warlock gear guide (anchor phase-4-andamp-5-tier-10 — this page combines P4+P5 into one table, unlike other classes' separate phase-5). Tier set: Sanctified Dark Coven line. Correction: Icy Veins' own table mistakenly repeats the Helm item (Sanctified Dark Coven Hood) in the Shoulders row (a site error, present on all three warlock pages) — the shoulder piece name here is inferred from the matching cloth-caster tier naming pattern (mage/priest both use "Shoulderpads" for this tier); verify against Wowhead before removing the draft badge. Enchants/gems shared by all three warlock specs.

items.source: The Ashen Verdict — reward from Path of Destruction

items.name: Ring of Rapid Ascent
items.source: Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic — Icecrown Gunship Battle — Armory

enchants.source: The Kirin Tor — Revered (Arcanum of Power alternative)

enchants.name: Greater Inscription of the Storm

enchants.name: Enchant Bracers — Superior Spellpower

enchants.name: Enchant Boots — Tuskarr's Vitality
enchants.source: Enchanting (Icewalker alternative; Nitro Boosts for engineers)

enchants.name: Enchant Staff — Greater Spellpower
enchants.source: Enchanting (staff); Enchant Weapon — Mighty Spellpower for main-hand

gems.name: Chaotic Skyflare Diamond (+40 spellpower, +3% crit damage — requires two blue/purple/green gems)
Runed Cardinal Ruby (+23 spellpower) — or Runed Scarlet Ruby (rare)
Reckless Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 haste) — or Veiled Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 hit), Rigid King's Amber for socket bonus
Purified Dreadstone (+10 spellpower / +10 spirit) — or Purified Twilight Opal (rare)
